violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back loading dock, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2024
The sprinkler system was observed draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2024
